name: Accent Table White Wash - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Give your living space arrangement an instant upgrade with this Accent Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted with a rubberwood frame, this accent table features a round shape in a white-wash, painted finish that brings modern appeal to your home decor. Place this accent table next to a sofa in your living room or between chairs to hold your favorite drinks and your latest reads.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
